questions.q: Ad scheduling (showing ads only at certain times) requires:
questions.explanation: Dayparting is only possible with a lifetime budget.

questions.q: Advantage+ campaign budget (CBO) is used to:
options: Set the budget per ad set manually
Have Meta distribute the budget across ad sets based on opportunity
questions.explanation: CBO moves spend to the best-performing ad set; ABO sets the budget per ad set.

options: Target results × expected cost per result
questions.explanation: In Auction the cost is variable; it's estimated with desired results and expected cost per result.

questions.q: Reservation plan: 400,000 people, frequency 2, fixed CPM $5. Approximate budget:
Main risk of a budget that's too low in Auction:
options: The ad set doesn't exit the learning phase and performance is unstable
questions.explanation: Without ~50 optimization events per week the ad set stays in learning; volatile results.
